Class: VailDecoder

VailDecoder(textCallback, initialWPM, bufferSize, flushTimeout)

VailDecoder manages morse code decoding for practice sessions. It handles timing input and outputs decoded text.

Constructor

new VailDecoder(textCallback, initialWPM, bufferSize, flushTimeout)

Parameters:
Name Type Default Description
textCallback function

Called when text is decoded: (text) => {}
initialWPM number 20

Initial WPM estimate (default: 20)
bufferSize number 20

Adaptive buffer size (default: 20, lower = faster)
flushTimeout number 600

Timeout in ms before flushing pending chars (default: 1000)
Source:
  • decoder.mjs, line 16

Classes

VailDecoder

Methods

addDurations(durations, timestamp)

Process morse code timing from a Duration array (Vail Repeater format)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
durations Array.<number>

Array of tone ON/OFF durations in milliseconds
timestamp number

Timestamp of the transmission start
Source:
  • decoder.mjs, line 75

addTone(duration, timestamp)

Process a key down/up event pair as a tone duration

Parameters:
Name Type Description
duration number

Duration of the tone in milliseconds
timestamp number

Timestamp when the tone started
Source:
  • decoder.mjs, line 49

clear()

Clear all accumulated text and reset decoder state

Source:
  • decoder.mjs, line 206

flush()

Flush any pending decoded characters

Source:
  • decoder.mjs, line 197

getFullText() → {string}

Get the full decoded text accumulated so far

  • decoder.mjs, line 174
Returns:
Type
string

getSpeed() → {Object}

Get current estimated speed

  • decoder.mjs, line 182
Returns:
Type
Object

reset()

Reset the decoder state (but keep accumulated text)

  • decoder.mjs, line 219

setBufferSize(bufferSize)

Update buffer size (requires decoder recreation)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
bufferSize number

New buffer size

  • decoder.mjs, line 126

setEnabled(enabled)

Enable or disable decoding

Parameters:
Name Type Description
enabled boolean

setFlushTimeout(timeout)

Update flush timeout

Parameters:
Name Type Description
timeout number

New flush timeout in ms

Parameters:
Name Type Description
wpm number
